mapper.select: SELECT warehouse_batch.batch_id, warehouse_batch.food_id, sys_food_info.food_name, sys_food_info.food_type, sys_food_info.unit, warehouse_batch.purchase_id, sys_purchase.purchase_no, sys_purchase.supplier_name, warehouse_batch.check_id, warehouse_batch.in_qty, warehouse_batch.remain_qty, warehouse_batch.in_time FROM warehouse_batch left join sys_food_info on warehouse_batch.food_id = sys_food_info.food_id left join sys_purchase on warehouse_batch.purchase_id = sys_purchase.purchase_id WHERE warehouse_batch.food_id = #{foodId} AND warehouse_batch.remain_qty > 0 order by warehouse_batch.in_time asc

SELECT warehouse_batch.batch_id, warehouse_batch.food_id, sys_food_info.food_name, sys_food_info.food_type, sys_food_info.unit, warehouse_batch.purchase_id, sys_purchase.purchase_no, sys_purchase.supplier_name, warehouse_batch.check_id, warehouse_batch.in_qty, warehouse_batch.remain_qty, warehouse_batch.in_time FROM warehouse_batch left join sys_food_info on warehouse_batch.food_id = sys_food_info.food_id left join sys_purchase on warehouse_batch.purchase_id = sys_purchase.purchase_id WHERE 1=1
AND warehouse_batch.food_id = #{foodId}
AND sys_food_info.food_name LIKE concat('%', #{foodName}, '%')
ORDER BY warehouse_batch.batch_id DESC

SELECT warehouse_batch.food_id AS foodId, sys_food_info.food_name AS foodName, sys_food_info.food_type AS foodType, sys_food_info.unit AS unit, sys_food_info.expire_days AS expireDays, SUM(warehouse_batch.remain_qty) AS totalStock FROM warehouse_batch left join sys_food_info on warehouse_batch.food_id = sys_food_info.food_id WHERE warehouse_batch.remain_qty > 0
AND sys_food_info.food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{foodName}, '%')
AND sys_food_info.food_type = #{foodType}
GROUP BY warehouse_batch.food_id, sys_food_info.food_name ORDER BY warehouse_batch.food_id
